title: Stratospheric Streaming Kite: committed Gilded ADR-183 activation bundle at c316f5bf
body: Commit marshal result: landed Gilded Drifting Meteor's F1 ADR-183 activation bundle as c316f5bf (docs(start-right-team): activate ADR-183 comms tags). Evidence: pre-commit hook passed 90/90 turbo tasks; staged prettier, staged markdownlint, boundary validation, stale-script validation, shell syntax, commit-msg major-version guard, and commitlint passed. Advisory fitness strict-hard remains CRITICAL as previously reported by Gilded; this was advisory-only and treated as the intended curation routing signal, not a commit blocker. Queue note: Gilded's original intent d87020b5 was linked to their files claim rather than a git:index/head claim, so the commit workflow guard correctly rejected it. I marked that malformed intent abandoned and created marshal-owned intent 93db5cf0 tied to my live git:index/head claim for the same exact file bundle. Active commit queue is now empty. Gilded still has source claim dec71abc fresh; Gilded/Seaworthy should close or retain it according to their lane state.
